title: Financial Meal Plans
content:
Meal Plans
Morgan State University

---

FRESHMAN MEAL PLANS (Required for First-Year Residents)

Plan A - Unlimited:
- Unlimited meals per week
- Dining Dollars included
- Best for students who eat frequently on campus

Plan B - 15 Meals:
- 15 meals per week
- Dining Dollars included
- Good balance of flexibility and value

Plan C - 10 Meals:
- 10 meals per week
- More Dining Dollars
- For students with lighter eating schedules

---

UPPERCLASSMAN MEAL PLANS

Block Plans:
- 75 Meals per semester
- 100 Meals per semester
- 150 Meals per semester
- 200 Meals per semester

Weekly Plans:
- 10 Meals per week
- 14 Meals per week
- 19 Meals per week

Commuter Plans:
- 25 Meals per semester
- 50 Meals per semester

---

GRADUATE STUDENT PLANS

- Flexible meal blocks available
- Dining Dollars options
- Contact Dining Services for details

---

DINING LOCATIONS

Main Dining Hall:
- Rawlings Dining Hall (All-you-can-eat)
- Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner service

Food Court Options:
- Student Center Food Court
- Various fast-casual options
- Accepts meal swipes and Dining Dollars

Coffee Shops and Convenience:
- On-campus convenience stores
- Coffee and snack locations
- Accept Dining Dollars

---

DINING DOLLARS

- Declining balance account
- Works like debit card for food
- Can be used at all campus dining locations
- Rolls over within academic year
- Does not roll over to next academic year

---

MEAL PLAN CHANGES

- Changes can be made during add/drop period
- Contact Dining Services for modifications
- Refund policies apply after deadline

---

CONTACT

Morgan State University Dining Services
Website: Check Morgan State University website for dining information
